findings.location: s1 — ディスパッチャの設定
findings.description: Source contains two bash code blocks illustrating the URI→method mapping: one for UserAction (nested package path: /action/management/user/UserAction/<リクエストID>) and one for MenuAction (shallow path: /action/MenuAction/<リクエストID>). The knowledge file only includes the UserAction example. The MenuAction example demonstrates a distinct mapping pattern where a class directly under the base package results in a shorter URI, which is useful for developers structuring their own actions.
findings.source_evidence: Source bash block: `<コンテキストパス>/action/MenuAction/<リクエストID>` / `nablarch.sample.MenuAction#do<リクエストID>(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)`
